name: Faceless Love
original_name: รักไม่รู้หน้า
overview: Veekit is a stoic young CEO with prosopagnosia or "face blindness," meaning he can't distinguish people's faces. For this reason, he decides to hire an assistant to help him connect with the rest of the world. Mirin becomes the girl responsible for that. Will it be possible to have a relationship beyond employer and employee?

trailers.title: [OFFICIAL TRAILER] “Faceless Love รักไม่รู้หน้า”
